title: Make it big
checkLabels.t3: The name must be INSIDE the tag
why.not-wrapped:
The tags are there, but they are in the wrong order or not closed. First

, then the text, then

. Exactly that order.
why.no-open: There is still no tag. You cannot write "make it big" — you have to WRAP the name. In front of it goes <h1>.
why.no-close: You opened the tag but never closed it. is missing. The slash says "the heading ends here" — without it the browser does not know how far it reaches.
why.empty-heading: The tags are there, but the heading is empty. Your name is outside it.
hint2.empty-heading: Look carefully at where ends and where your name sits. One is after the other, but it should be inside.
hint3.empty-heading:
Wrapping means: tag in front, text in the middle, tag behind.

HERE

, not

HERE.
blocks.0.text: Your name is there, but it is small. It sits like a random word on a blank sheet. But you want it to be a heading — large, bold, important.
blocks.2.text: Try to make it bigger. Seriously, try. You will not manage — and that is exactly the point.
blocks.3.text: There is no way to write "make it big". There is no font button. There is nowhere to click. Plain text just sits there.
blocks.5.text:
You wrap the text on both sides. In front you put

, behind it

. The slash at the end says "this is where it ends".
blocks.7.text: Do it and run. The name becomes large and bold.
blocks.8.text: Notice what you did NOT do: you did not choose a font, you did not say how big, you did not touch colour. You only said "this is a heading". The rest the browser decided.
